summary: Tested Share Portfolio feature - all core functionality working. Page loads correctly, CRUD operations work, ownership filtering works, Sync to Budget updates dividends, Company Dividend Distribution sliders work.

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts library issue, chart still renders correctly

passed_tests: Share Portfolio page loads correctly at /share-portfolio
Page title 'Share Portfolio' displays correctly
data-testid='share-portfolio-page' container visible
Summary cards display: Total Value ($139,270), Unrealised Gain/Loss ($12,085), Annual Dividends ($5,666), Company Franking ($45,000)
Ownership tabs (All, Personal, Joint, Company) visible and clickable
Tab filtering works: All=7, Personal=3, Joint=2, Company=2 holdings
Navigation sidebar shows 'SHARES' group
Share Portfolio link in sidebar navigates to /share-portfolio
Add Holding button opens modal with form fields
Add Share modal has: Symbol, Ownership, Owner, Company Name, Quantity, Purchase Price, Current Price, Dividend Yield, Franking %, Purchase Date, Sector
Adding new share increases holdings count and updates totals
Toast notification 'Share added to portfolio' appears after adding
Delete button (trash icon) removes share from portfolio
Toast notification 'Share removed from portfolio' appears after deleting
Sync to Budget button updates budget with dividend income
Toast notification 'Budget updated: $243/month in dividends' appears
Ownership Distribution pie chart renders with Personal, Joint, Company segments
Annual Dividends section shows Personal ($1,904), Joint ($2,012), Company ($1,750)
Company Dividend Distribution section visible when company shares exist
Company Dividend Distribution sliders work (To Personal, To Trust)
Distribute Dividends button distributes company dividends
Toast notification 'Distributed $525 to personal, $0 to trust' appears
ATO Compliance notice visible at bottom of page
/cgt route works and shows Capital Gains Tax page
action_items: MINOR: Old CGT routes (/cgt-calculator, /cgt-events) show blank pages - consider adding redirect to /cgt or 404 page
MINOR: Recharts console warnings about chart dimensions - consider adding minWidth/minHeight to ChartContainer
critical_code_review_comments: SharePortfolio.jsx uses shared context correctly (sharePortfolio, addShare, updateShare, removeShare, company, trust, budget)
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Sync to Budget correctly calculates personal dividends including 50% of joint dividends
Company dividend distribution correctly updates trust and franking account

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Share Portfolio features working correctly

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - uses localStorage and default values from App.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Share Portfolio feature fully tested and working. All CRUD operations (add, filter, delete shares) work. Sync to Budget updates dividend income. Company Dividend Distribution sliders work. Old CGT routes show blank pages but /cgt works. Previous iteration issues (TrustDistributionAnalysis local state, HouseholdBudget local state, IncomeSplitting $NaN) were not retested in this iteration.

components: Summary cards (Total Value, Unrealised Gain/Loss, Annual Dividends, Company Franking)

features: Opens on Add Holding button click
Form fields: Symbol, Ownership, Owner, Company Name, Quantity, Purchase Price, Current Price, Dividend Yield, Franking %, Purchase Date, Sector
Adds share to portfolio on submit
Calculates personal dividends + 50% of joint dividends
Distribute Dividends button updates trust and franking account

mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - stored in React Context and localStorage. No backend database connection.
